use_cases: Displaying image galleries with interactive 3D perspective rotation on hover
Creating masonry-style product grids with staggered scroll animations
Building portfolio showcases with spring-based mouse tracking effects
Implementing content grids with preserved 3D transforms and smooth damping
ai_summary: A generic masonry grid layout component with advanced 3D hover effects using Framer Motion. Items respond to mouse movement with spring-based rotation along X and Y axes, creating an interactive perspective tilt effect. Supports staggered entrance animations via scroll-in-view detection and customizable gap spacing.
